title: duroia nitida
intro: Duroia nitida, also known as "water hater," is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Duroia nitida has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Duroia nitida include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
